extra.message: User input from the 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string via from_string() and rendered. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), enabling attackers to execute arbitrary template expressions and potentially achieve remote code execution.

The 'username' query parameter is embedded directly into a Jinja2 template string (not passed as a template variable), causing any HTML/JavaScript payload to be rendered as literal text. The result is returned as HTMLResponse, leading to reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).
